title: Purple Dream Experience Bar
description: Villagers' XP Bar are included! 紫色幻梦经验条，村民也有份！
body:
**Purple Dream XP Bar – A Minimalist Yet Elegant Visual Upgrade**  

Tired of the vanilla green XP bar? The **Purple Dream XP Bar** resource pack brings you a fresh visual experience! This pack replaces all in-game XP bars (including GUI, villager trading interfaces, etc.) with an elegant purple hue, adding a touch of mystery and fantasy while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic.  

### ✨ **Key Features**  
- **Full Compatibility**: Works in all vanilla XP bar scenarios (player XP, enchanting, villager trading, etc.).  
- **Minimalist Design**: Uses a desaturated purple tone to reduce eye strain and blend seamlessly with most UI styles.  
- **Lightweight & Efficient**: Only texture files are modified—zero performance impact, compatible with other packs/mods.  

### 🎨 **Perfect For**  
- Players who love purple-themed aesthetics;  
- Survival/building worlds seeking subtle UI personalization;  
- Pairs beautifully with dark-themed resource packs!  

Simply drag and drop into your resource pack folder—no setup required. Let every level-up immerse you in the dreamy purple glow!  

> *"When the XP bar turns purple, even mining feels like collecting starlight."*  

**By downloading, you agree that this pack is for personal use only. Redistribution or modification is prohibited.**

---

**紫色幻梦经验条 - 简约而优雅的视觉升级**  

厌倦了原版单调的绿色经验条？**紫色幻梦经验条**资源包为您带来全新的视觉体验！本资源包将游戏内所有经验条（包括GUI、村民交易界面等）替换为优雅的紫色，在保留原版风格的同时，增添一抹神秘而梦幻的色彩。  

### ✨ **特色功能**  
- **全面适配**：覆盖所有原版经验条场景（角色经验、附魔、村民交易等）。  
- **简约设计**：采用低饱和度的紫色，避免视觉疲劳，与多数UI风格和谐搭配。  
- **轻量无负担**：仅修改纹理文件，零性能影响，兼容其他资源包/模组。  

### 🎨 **适用场景**  
- 偏爱紫色系的玩家；  
- 追求界面细节个性化的生存/建筑存档；  
- 搭配暗色主题资源包效果更佳！  

只需拖动至资源包文件夹即可激活，无需额外设置。让您的每一次升级都沉浸在紫色幻梦的氛围中吧！  

> *"当经验条变成紫色，连挖矿都像在收集星光。"*  

**下载即视为同意本资源包仅供个人使用，禁止二次修改后重新发布。**
